description: Each derivative chain holds numerically: the product rule on x²·sin(x), the chain rule on (x²+1)³ with its \cdot step, and the root derivative
\frac{d}{dx} as the operator, \left( \right) growing around the differentiated expression, \cdot between the chain-rule factors
The chain rule shows the outer·inner middle step before simplifying — the derivation, not just the answer
Text and math read well; markers kept; braces tidy
